scope_item: EXP-A7 — Phase A design refresh, Item 5 (demote Latest Findings without banishing).
summary: EXP-212 drafted and saved. This is a FOUNDATIONAL_MODEL_CHANGE under HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A-001's hard hold. Do NOT integrate until operator posts HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-NNN with approved_exp_ids containing 'EXP-212' (author: operator, status: pending at read time). Draft reduces .breaking-news chrome (2px accent border + gradient → 1px rule border + flat card-bg), rewrites .bn-header as a muted uppercase letter-spaced eyebrow (removes 📰 emoji and accent-color hero styling), moves the block from Overview-top to Overview-bottom (between verdict-legend and nav.toc), and adds four test.js assertions. All three bn-item entries + anchor links + template expressions preserved byte-for-byte; NC4 (Latest Findings stays on Overview) explicitly honored. Uses var() with fallbacks so integration order relative to EXP-202 is non-strict. Remaining Phase A draft: EXP-A8 (a11y audit + fixes).
